mainText:
Promo: "Join Bank of Entitlement! Where inflated egos meet limitless credit."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this, I strolled into Bank of Entitlement with my usual swagger, ready to demand my well-deserved VIP treatment. I waltzed up to the teller, who should've recognized the sheer importance radiating from my perfectly coiffed hair, and asked for a loan to fund my latest yacht purchase. But would you believe it? The nerve of this teller! She had the audacity to ask for proof of income. Proof of income! Me, Hot Josh, the CEO of this fine establishment, needing to justify my financial status? Outrageous! I gave her a withering look, tapped my foot impatiently, and demanded to speak with the manager. When the manager finally appeared, looking slightly nervous, I unleashed the full force of my entitlement upon him. I regaled him with tales of my social media following, my impeccable taste in avocado toast, and the sheer injustice of being questioned in such a manner. With each word, my anger grew, until I declared that if my loan was not approved on the spot, I would be taking my business elsewhere. The manager, realizing the grave mistake he had made, quickly backtracked, offering me the loan without any further questions.I strutted out of that bank feeling vindicated, secure in the knowledge that my rightful place at the top of the social hierarchy had been acknowledged. After all, in the world of Hot Josh, one does not simply question the financial prowess of a man with such immaculate grooming.
